info.description:
API-first platform for running persistent Claude AI agents on Kubernetes.
Designed to be driven by external systems — create agents, send tasks, and stream real-time results via REST + WebSocket.
info.title: komputer.ai API

get.description: Returns all agents with their current status in the specified namespace.

post.description:
Creates a new agent or sends a task to an existing idle agent (upsert by name).
If the agent doesn't exist, it is created. If it exists and is idle, the task is forwarded.

409.description: Agent is busy or has no running pod

get.description: Returns the current status and metadata for a single agent.

delete.description: Deletes the agent CR, pod, PVC, secrets, and Redis event stream.

patch.description: Updates model, lifecycle, instructions, secretRefs, memories, skills, or connectors on an existing agent.

post.description: Gracefully cancels the currently running task. The agent pod stays alive for future tasks.

get.description: Returns recent events from the agent's Redis stream in chronological order.
Upgrades to a WebSocket connection to stream real-time agent events. Events include task_started, thinking, tool_call, tool_result, text, task_completed, task_cancelled, and error.
Returns all connectors with attached agent counts in the specified namespace.

post.description: Creates a new KomputerConnector CR pointing to an MCP server that can be attached to agents.

get.description: Returns the URL, service, type, and auth config for a single connector.
Calls the MCP server's tools/list endpoint and returns the available tools.
Returns all memories with content and attached agent counts in the specified namespace.

post.description: Creates a new KomputerMemory CR that can be attached to agents as persistent context.

get.description: Returns the content and attached agent count for a single memory.

patch.description: Updates the content or description of an existing memory.

get.description: Returns all Kubernetes namespaces the API has access to.
Returns all offices with their current status in the specified namespace.
Returns the current status and member list for a single office.

delete.description: Deletes the office CR and cleans up Redis event streams for all member agents.

get.description: Returns merged events from all member agent Redis streams, sorted chronologically.
Returns all schedules with their current status and run history in the specified namespace.

post.description: Creates a new KomputerSchedule CR that triggers agent tasks on a cron schedule.

get.description: Returns the current status and run history for a single schedule.

delete.description: Deletes the schedule CR. Does not delete any agents that were created by the schedule.

patch.description: Updates the cron expression for an existing schedule.

get.description: Returns all secrets with key names (not values) and attached agent counts in the specified namespace.

parameters.description: Include all secrets, not just managed ones
parameters.name: all

post.description: Creates a new Kubernetes secret managed by komputer.ai that can be attached to agents.

patch.description: Replaces the key-value pairs in a managed Kubernetes secret.

get.description: Returns all skills with content and attached agent counts in the specified namespace.

post.description: Creates a new KomputerSkill CR with script content that can be attached to agents.

get.description: Returns the content, description, and attached agent count for a single skill.

patch.description: Updates the description or script content of an existing skill.

get.description: Returns all agent templates (both namespace-scoped and cluster-scoped) available in the specified namespace.

connectors.description: KomputerConnector names attached to this agent

memories.description: KomputerMemory names attached to this agent

secrets.description: Key names from K8s Secrets (not values)

skills.description: KomputerSkill names attached to this agent

secretRefs.description: names of existing K8s Secrets to attach
full replacement list of K8s secret names
